reviews.review_description:
I enjoyed this game a lot more than I thought I would! It’s organized perfectly from training, so you can understand the basics of how the game works, all the way to the very fun, fast-paced endless mode! I highly recommend it for anyone who’s interested in a fast pace, dodging game that is bound to get your heart pumping! The best part was being able to deflect balls with your own green ball, and I even managed to hit a few into the basketball net and scored a free glove skin!

Outstanding work! You can tell dedication and fun were put into it!

I didn’t expect how nice the workout would end up being. It’s a nice workout where you have to duck, dodge, slip, and move all around to avoid flying balls. I like the arcade game mode especially, a little extra goofy. The game has a “three strikes your out” system, goofy atmosphere, and a leaderboard for yourself which all makes it a good time. All you need is a big enough play space to move around a little bit

I found myself sweating and getting into it pretty quickly, so it’s a good way to get some fun exercise in a short time. Overall, don’t expect any super great quality, but it’s still a pretty neat game for what it is

I got this game for $1.00 only so I'm not gonna complain too much, but this game does lack Quality of Life (QoL) features such as the Meta button doesn't reset your game space / forward view and there is no volume option whatsoever, so you can't ever turn off the background music which is luckily doesn't sound annoying. ── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──  You'll get a good workout from all the dodging and sidestepping in this game but make sure your surroundings is clear as this game is fully VR and has no MR option which would've been more suited for this kind of game for safety reasons. Furthermore, I believe the dev hasn't updated this game in forever and at this rate probably doesn't intend to ever. ── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──  I also was unable to use my hands to slap the ball away even though the game said I could.
Fun workout for short periods of time with many variations of challenges.

I watched a couple of YouTube videos regarding the dev before buying this game. I support them. The game is simple but so real. I played for 10 minutes and started sweating. Good workout! The leaderboard is great. It makes me keep trying. It’s a good game. But I don’t like “get out of here” sound track. Instead, we need positive reinforcement.

reviews.review_title: Fun but how do you throw the balls?
reviews.review_description: I’m likely missing something, but I can’t figure out how to throw a ball.

developer_response.body: Currently there is no throwing. The game is meant to train your reflexes in dodging

reviews.review_description: Super simple game, but if you have the proper space, this is a proper leg work out! I use this game to warm up and get my feet moving, but its also a great way to get used to your guardian boundaries.

This game makes dodgeball such an enjoyable experience. Not only can you dodge balls, you can block them with a ball, slice them with a sword, shoot them with a shooter AND they dont only throw balls, you’ll see a wrench coming your way 😂 Very creative twist on dodgeball 👌🏼
